issue_title: IsDragReject evaluating to true when accepting 'application/ld+json' file type
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
When using mime type 'application/ld+json' the isDragReject is emitting true. 

**To Reproduce**
[code sandbox example of the issue](https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/react-dropzone-example-forked-rkvncr?file=%2Fsrc%2FApp.js%3A24%2C6&layout=%257B%2522sidebarPanel%2522%253A%25
test_description_zh: 在 react-dropzone 中设置 accept 为 'application/ld+json' 类型，拖拽一个 .jsonld 文件到拖放区域，观察拖放区域的拒绝状态指示（如颜色变化或 isDragReject 状态）
expected_result_zh: 拖拽符合 'application/ld+json' MIME 类型的文件到拖放区域时，isDragReject 应为 false，拖放区域应显示为接受状态（如绿色边框或正常样式），而不是拒绝状态（如红色边框或拒绝提示）
